_comment: Opt-in mutation testing for the domain core. Run with `npm run test:mutation` (uses npx; not a committed dependency or a CI gate — see TESTING.md). Stryker mutates src/domain and re-runs the suite; surviving mutants are gaps where a real bug would slip past the tests. tsconfigFile points at a deliberately absent file so Stryker skips its tsconfig rewrite — the Vitest runner compiles TS via Vite/esbuild, so no tsc is needed and the npx-isolated run resolves cleanly.
